sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 10.54 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.10)

statement.latex: (R.\,G\"obel). For a cardinal number$$, let$${ Z}^{< }=\{ f { Z}^{ } |{ supp}\, (f)| < \} \; \; \; \; \; \; \; \; G_{ }={ Z}^{ }/{ Z}^{< }.$$-1ex [r]{a)} Find a non-zero direct summand$D$of$G_{ _1}$such that$D G_{ _1}$. [r]{b)} Investigate the structure of$G_{ }$(the structure of$G_{ _0}$is well known).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
